meaning: n.(=Zebulun)泽伦(族)(以色列十二个部族之一)
examples: And in France, a couple who wanted to call their son Zebulon were told they faced court if the name could expose the child to mockery.
From high up on the mountain, the couple have a bird's-eye view of the farms and woods of Zebulon Valley, where Deanna was born and raised.
Nock's wife of 25 years, Jenny, wrote and directs "Bello Mania, " while daughter Amariah, 19, is stage manager, daughter Annalise, 18, and son Zebulon Freicke, 22, join him on the high wire.
